text: Experienced in Python, pandas, numpy, scikit-learn and building ML models.
Built data pipelines, ETL processes and worked with Spark and Hadoop.
Developed REST APIs with Node.js, Express and PostgreSQL.
Frontend development using React, TypeScript, CSS and responsive design.
Designed and deployed Docker + Kubernetes based microservices on AWS.
Implemented deep learning models in TensorFlow and PyTorch for CV tasks.
Android application development using Kotlin and Android SDK.
Backend systems in Java with Spring Boot and MySQL integration.
Led agile teams, coordinated sprints, and practiced Scrum ceremonies.
Worked on cloud architecture (AWS, GCP), IaC with Terraform and CI/CD.
Created dashboards and visualizations with Tableau and Power BI.
Experience with NLP, transformers, huggingface and text classification.
